headline: Housing Stocks Are in Depression Mode. Whirlpool Down 81%, Lennar Crashed 54% While the S&P 500 Soars.
summary: The S&P 500 is at fresh highs while a giant chunk of the real economy sits in a deep freeze. On a recent episode of The Compound and Friends, Michael Batnick and Josh Brown spent a segment unpacking why housing-adjacent stocks have collapsed even as home prices across major metros stay stable. The distinction matters: ... Housing Stocks Are in Depression Mode. Whirlpool Down 81%, Lennar Crashed 54% While the S&P 500 Soars.

headline: Is Lennar Corporation (LEN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is LEN a good stock to buy? We came across a bearish thesis on Lennar Corporation on Hunterbrook’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bears’ thesis on LEN. Lennar Corporation’s share was trading at $84.36 as of May 4th. LEN’s trailing and forward P/E were 12.73 and 14.43 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Lennar Corporation, […]

headline: Lennar Corp (NYSE:LEN) Stands Out in Best Dividend Stocks Screen with Strong Yield and Financial Health
summary: Lennar Corp offers a strong dividend profile with a 2.28% yield, 26.65% five-year growth, and solid financial health. With a P/E of 12.34 and improving earnings outlook, it’s a top pick for dividend-focused investors.
